mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM users WHERE public_id = #{publicId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT nickname FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO friendships ( requester_user_id, receiver_user_id, status ) VALUES ( #{requesterUserId}, #{targetUserId}, 'PENDING' )
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN requester_user_id = #{userId} THEN receiver_user_id ELSE requester_user_id END AS friendUserId FROM friendships WHERE status = 'ACCEPTED' AND ( requester_user_id = #{userId} OR receiver_user_id = #{userId} )
